response.justification: The candidate is an experienced polyglot software craftsman with strong testing/TDD values and a track record on complex systems, but the resume shows essentially no depth in the specific stack this role requires: Java appears only in passing on two older projects, Kotlin is not mentioned at all, and there is no Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, application server, or IDE-internals experience. Closest adjacency is a brief stint writing C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. Primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node and DLang, which does not map to JVM tooling work.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling
Proven track record on complex, large-scale and low-latency systems
Polyglot background with C/C++ IDE component experience at National Instruments
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only marginal Java exposure
No Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise JVM framework experience
No IDE-internals or language-tooling work beyond a brief C/C++ stint years ago

key_factors.factor: No IDE internals or JVM language-tooling experience
Strong engineering fundamentals and TDD discipline
